response.processed:
AccordionSection: bg $surface-bg, boc $muted-col, bor 1, rad $md-rad
  state expanded
    h auto, bg $elevated-bg

AccordionHeader: ver-center, spread, pad $md-pad, bg $surface-bg, cursor pointer
  state expanded
    bg $primary-bg, col $on-primary-col

Col gap $md-gap, w full
  AccordionSection
    AccordionHeader
      onclick: change self to expanded
      Text "Section 1"
      Icon named chevron-down
    Col pad $md-pad, hidden
      Paragraph "Content for Section 1"
  AccordionSection
    AccordionHeader
      onclick: change self to expanded
      Text "Section 2"
      Icon named chevron-down
    Col pad $md-pad, hidden
      Paragraph "Content for Section 2"
  AccordionSection
    AccordionHeader
      onclick: change self to expanded
      Text "Section 3"
      Icon named chevron-down
    Col pad $md-pad, hidden
      Paragraph "Content for Section 3"
